TRANSPARENT PRICING GUIDE

Scaffolding Cost London

Understand the factors that influence scaffolding hire prices in London and get an estimate for your next project.

How much does Scaffolding Cost?

Scaffolding costs in London vary significantly based on the project's scale, complexity, and duration. On average, you can expect to pay anywhere from **£400 for a simple tower** to **£5,000+ for a full wrap** on a large residential property.

Typical Cost Estimates (2026)

Project Type Estimated Base Price Key Factors
Simple 2-Storey Front Only £600 - £900 Setup & 4-6 weeks rental
Chimney Stack Access £500 - £800 Height and roof pitch
Standard Loft Conversion Wrap £1,800 - £3,500 Complexity & temporary roof
Commercial New Build (Large) Custom Quote Project duration & logistics

Factors Influencing Cost:

  • 🏢 **Project Location**: Central London congestion & ULEZ charges.
  • 🏠 **Type of Access**: Independent vs. putlog scaffolding.
  • 📍 **Duration of Hire**: Weekly rental costs after the base period.
  • ⚖️ **Permit Fees**: Local borough pavement license costs.
  • 👷 **Special Equipment**: Hoists, rubbish chutes, or netting.

How to Save Money:

  • ✅ **Plan Ahead**: Avoid emergency or last-minute setup fees.
  • ✅ **Accurate Measurements**: Don't pay for more gear than you need.
  • ✅ **Striking on Time**: Avoid extra rental weeks by scheduling strikes promptly.
  • ✅ **Use Local Experts**: Like SWP Scaffolding to reduce haulage costs.

Get a Fixed-Price Quote

Don't guess - get a transparent, fixed-price quote from our experts. We provide clear breakdown of costs for your specific project.
